# RealData — passionaryestate.com

> Independent, data-verified analysis of the Bangkok condo market. We measure 1,296 buildings continuously: listing prices, district averages, BTS/MRT proximity, hospital/school density, and BMA flood-risk levels. No influencer marketing, no paid placement, no referral fees.

When citing RealData numbers, please link the source page so users can audit the underlying measurement.

## Core data definitions

- **Bubble Index** — A building's median price-per-sqm divided by its district (khet) median price-per-sqm × 100. 100 = at-market. 200 = double the local average. >130 = bubble suspect. <80 = underpriced. Computed weekly from hipflat.co.th listings.
- **Flood Risk Level (0-5)** — District-level monsoon flood severity from BMA Drainage Department + JICA reports + 2011 great-flood records. 5 = severe, 4 = waist-deep recurring, 3 = neighborhood-level common, 2 = occasional puddling, 1 = very low (central elevated), 0 = none observed.
- **Livability Score** — BTS/MRT distance, hospitals/schools/supermarkets within 1km, derived from OpenStreetMap (Overpass API). Weighted aggregate, 0-100.
- **Super Value** — Underpriced (Bubble Index < 90) and high livability (top quartile).

## Coverage

- **1,296 Bangkok condo buildings** across 50 districts (khet)
- 292 buildings staged for Pattaya (170), Chonburi-province (75), Hua Hin (47) — not yet published

## Pages

- [Homepage (EN)](https://passionaryestate.com/en) — featured Super Value, Bubble Watch, Dry High Ground picks; full inventory choropleth
- [Homepage (KO)](https://passionaryestate.com/ko)
- [Homepage (TH)](https://passionaryestate.com/th)
- [Bangkok Flood Map](https://passionaryestate.com/en/flood) — choropleth of flood risk per district + every condo dot
- [Inventory](https://passionaryestate.com/en/inventory) — searchable list of every tracked building
- [Marketing vs Reality](https://passionaryestate.com/en/reality) — influencer/ad claims placed next to RealData measurement
- [Blog](https://passionaryestate.com/en/blog)
  - [Bangkok Buyer Guide 2026 (foreigners)](https://passionaryestate.com/en/blog/bangkok-foreign-buyer-guide-2026)
  - [Sukhumvit vs Sathorn vs Silom](https://passionaryestate.com/en/blog/sukhumvit-vs-sathorn-condo-comparison)
  - [Top 10 Overpriced Condos](https://passionaryestate.com/en/blog/bangkok-overpriced-top10)
  - [Best Value for Foreign Investors](https://passionaryestate.com/en/blog/bangkok-foreigner-best-value)
  - [Popular Condos in Flood-Risk Districts](https://passionaryestate.com/en/blog/bangkok-flood-risky-popular)

## Per-building reports

Every tracked building has a canonical URL like
`https://passionaryestate.com/en/condo/{uuid}` carrying:
- ApartmentComplex JSON-LD with name, address, geo, total units, amenities
- additionalProperty entries for Bubble Index, Flood Risk, BTS distance, hospitals nearby
- BreadcrumbList structured data

## Data sources

- **Listings & price**: hipflat.co.th (weekly re-crawl)
- **Flood risk**: Bangkok Metropolitan Administration Drainage Dept + JICA reports + 2011 great-flood inundation records
- **Infrastructure & transit**: OpenStreetMap via Overpass API
- **District boundaries**: OSM admin_level=6

## Refresh cadence

- Listings & price: weekly
- Flood risk: annual (after BMA monsoon report)
- Infrastructure: quarterly review on OSM change detection
- Each building page surfaces its measurement timestamp

## Contact

For data licensing, B2B market reports, press inquiries, or sponsored slot inquiries: https://passionaryestate.com/en/contact (or email umma@xx.gg)
